title: Mapping transcriptional responses to cellular perturbation dictionaries with RNA fingerprinting
author: Grabski, Isabella
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These Seurat objects represent new datasets generated in the preprint  "Mapping transcriptional responses to cellular perturbation dictionaries with RNA fingerprinting."  See below for the description of the files, and the preprint for full details. 
 hdac_perturbation_screen.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA and Guides (GDO) for the HDAC CRISPRi perturbation screen in the paper 
 flexplex_screen.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA, Protein (ADT), and OligoHash (HTO) for the FlexPlex drug screen in the paper
